Name: Technical Assets Provision
Description: Client uploads floor plans, 3D files, and site-specific utility maps.

Name: Brand & Artwork Delivery
Description: Client provides high-res logos and print-ready digital files for production.

Name: 3D Modeling & Rendering
Description: Aesthetic visualization and spatial design for client approval.

Name: Production Drafting
Description: Creation of CAM/CNC files, cutting lists, and technical construction drawings.

Name: 3D Print Slicing & Prep
Description: Conversion of 3D models into G-code, including support structure design and material selection.

Name: Design & Technical Sign-off
Description: Client formal approval of renders, materials, and final dimensions.

Name: CNC & Milling
Description: Subtractive manufacturing for wood, plastics, or aluminum components.

Name: 3D Printing (Additive)
Description: Layer-by-layer production of custom connectors, props, or complex geometric parts.

Name: Cutting & Sizing
Description: Manual or semi-automatic cutting of raw materials (profiles, panels, fabrics).

Name: Assembly & Joinery
Description: Structural bonding, welding, or carpentry assembly of custom-built elements.

Name: Surface Finishing
Description: Painting, coating, or laminating of raw fabricated or 3D-printed parts.

Name: Digital Printing
Description: Large-format printing on vinyl, textile, or rigid substrates.

Name: Picking & Kitting
Description: Retrieval of standard stock items to be merged with custom FAB parts.

Name: Pre-Assembly
Description: Integration of FAB/3D parts and Stock items for a "dry run" or modular build.

Name: Quality Control Outbound
Description: Tolerance check on fabricated parts and functional test of electronics.

Name: Packing & Crating
Description: Custom crating for fragile FAB/3D elements and standard packing for stock.

Name: Load-Out & Dispatch
Description: Physical loading of vehicles and transport document verification.

Name: Transit & Freight
Description: Managing transport, customs, and site access scheduling (slots).

Name: Unloading & Staging
Description: On-site reception and strategic distribution of crates.

Name: Main Installation
Description: On-site assembly of fabricated modules and standard structures.

Name: Fine Tuning & Styling
Description: Final aesthetic touch-ups, graphic application, and cleaning.

Name: Handover & Sign-off
Description: Client walkthrough and formal acceptance of the installation.

Name: Dismantling
Description: Deconstruction and breakdown of the setup.

Name: Material Categorization
Description: Sorting custom FAB/3D (often scrap) vs. standard Stock (reusable).

Name: Return Logistics
Description: Loading and transport back to the production hub.

Name: Inbound Inspection
Description: Damage assessment and inventory reconciliation.

Name: Restoration & Maintenance
Description: Repairing stock items; recycling or disposing of custom FAB parts.

Name: Re-Stocking
Description: Final inventory update and physical shelving of materials.

Name: Post-Project Review
Description: Analysis of "Planned vs. Actual" performance and ROI.
